verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable rule immediately: "never change the meaning of an existing contract; only add to it"; A starts with a general setup before the plan.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleanly to "default to URL path versioning"; A recommends URI path too but spends more space on a comparison table and "strong alternative".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the same core plan in fewer steps: path versioning, define breaking changes, parallel versions, sunset policy, contract tests.
